title: KamelCraft
body:
First of all huge thanks to Suel_ki, vicisacat, cola98765, LunaPixelStudios, 2No2Name, fallen-breath, MaxNeedsSnacks, Dunk3ll1cht, juliand665, pop4959, axieum, TomTheFurry, shedaniel, RaphiMC, jeseibel, SuperMartijn642, Lortseam, Serilum, jellysquid3, Pandarix, 1Foxy2, Tschipcraft, fzzyhmstrs, Juuz, FoundationGames, squeek502, Marc-IceBlade, embeddedt, YaLTeR, Fourmisain, Ennui, naomi, CodexAdrian, epic_oreo, kyrptonaught, Snownee, DasBlackfur, lucko, coderbot, qendolin, Goby56, Prospector, Pelotrio, Mrbysco, tr7zw, thexaero, creativemd, IMS, KikuGie, keksuccino, enjarai, Patbox, cominixo, henkelmax, Up, randommcsomethin, BrekiTomasson, AlexNijjar, comp500, malte0811, yeshi__, way2muchnoise, isxander, draylar, jaredlll08, robotkoer, gayasslily, PepperCode1, Cristelknight, Emi, sfPlayer1, ZestyBlaze, modmuss50, Stridey, Aizistral, LostLuma, Fuzs, Globox1997, ThatGravyBoat, Ran, FlashyReese, Kekie6, FX, coolGi, Morippi, legoatoom, noobanidus, vladmarica, s809, TreyRuffy, BreadLoaf and all other amazing contributors for all their amazing mods that were used in this modpack. 

This is a simple Vanilla+ modpack, that tries really hard to focus on being Vanilla+.
It is mostly focused around Terralith/Incendium/Nullscape and its world generation, decorative blocks, a few utilities and of course, performance. To go along with the amazing world, Distant Horizons comes preconfigured.
Theres no tech mods, no create and no major overhaul beyond the world generation.

The only content mods are, Better Archeology, Chipped, Handcrafted, Magnum Torch, Rechiseled and the Terralith/Incendium/Nullscape.

This pack is intended to be used on the KamelCraft server but you are free to use it however you want.
